input.initialPrompt: Before creating anything, show me exactly what files would be generated if I create a Blazor Web App called MyBlazorApp in ./test-output with interactive server rendering. Don't actually create the project yet.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Dry-run Blazor Web App template with server interactivity

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Dry-run Blazor Web App template with server interactivity

data.reasoningText: The user wants to see what files would be generated by creating a Blazor Web App with interactive server rendering, without actually creating it. I can use `dotnet new blazor` with the `--dry-run` flag to show what would be generated.

arguments.description: Dry-run Blazor Web App template with server interactivity

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new blazor --name MyBlazorApp --output ./test-output --interactivity Server --dry-run 2>&1", "description": "Dry-run Blazor Web App template with server interactivity", "initial_wait": 15}

data.content:
Here's the full list. The template would generate **68 files** across these groups:

| Group | Files |
|---|---|
| **Root** | `MyBlazorApp.csproj`, `Program.cs`, `appsettings.json`, `appsettings.Development.json` |
| **Properties** | `launchSettings.json` |
| **Components** | `App.razor`, `Routes.razor`, `_Imports.razor` |
| **Components/Layout** | `MainLayout.razor` + `.css`, `NavMenu.razor` + `.css`, `ReconnectModal.razor` + `.css` + `.js` |
| **Components/Pages** | `Counter.razor`, `Error.razor`, `Home.razor`, `NotFound.razor`, `Weather.razor` |
| **wwwroot** | `app.css`, `favicon.png` |
| **wwwroot/lib/bootstrap** | Full Bootstrap dist (~48 CSS/JS files + source maps) |

A post-creation `dotnet restore` would also run automatically. Say the word and I'll create it for real.
